content.full_text:
December 11, 1990

California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 94804-0807

Re: Surplus Monies

My questions are:

1. When an incumbent is not re-elected and has surplus money left in campaign account, what are his options? Give money to charity, give money to other candidates and transfer to new account for a future candidacy to another office? When?

2. When an incumbent is re-elected, how long does he have to transfer funds to a new account for a future candidacy to another office?

Please respond in writing for my files.

Very truly yours,

LORRAINE D'ELIA
City Clerk
